use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use jsql because ### jsql-injection.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair jsql with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `jsql --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### jsql-injection.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install jsql
Install with: sudo apt install jsql
